hooks.command: PANE_ID="${ZELLIJ_PANE_ID:-}"; PANE_NAME="${ZELLIJ_PANE_NAME:-not-in-zellij}"; lnotify --title "Codex" --message "Pane: $PANE_NAME" --exec "sh -lc 'if test -n \"$PANE_ID\"; then open -a Alacritty; zellij action focus-pane-id terminal_$PANE_ID; fi'"

PANE_ID="${ZELLIJ_PANE_ID:-}"; PANE_NAME="${ZELLIJ_PANE_NAME:-not-in-zellij}"; lnotify --title "Codex" --message "Pane: $PANE_NAME" --exec "sh -lc 'if test -n \"$PANE_ID\"; then open -a Alacritty; zellij action focus-pane-id terminal_$PANE_ID; fi'"
